---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new workflow, scoring capability, or product improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem
What user problem are we trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the expected behavior or workflow.

## Why It Matters
Explain how this helps users improve CLI-based AI agents with less guesswork.

## Suggested Surface
Which part of the project does this touch?
- tracing
- interactive sync
- interactive scoring
- evals
- case generation
- docs or instructions
- repo structure or tooling

## Additional Context
Add examples, prior art, or links if helpful.
